name: Creole Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 lb Canned tomatoes, undrained, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot over medium heat, melt the margarine.
2. Slowly blend in the flour and stir constantly until the mixture is light brown.
3. Add onions, celery, garlic, and parsley, and continue stirring until the vegetables are tender.
4. Gradually add chicken broth. Stir in remaining ingredients except seafood.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add fish and oysters, and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Add shrimp and cook for another 5 minutes or until all seafood is cooked through.
